actions.name: Ballistic (Active)
actions.description:
Trigger: The user declares a @Trait[contact] Attack.

Effect: Until the triggering Attack is resolved, it loses @Trait[contact] and gains @Trait[missile]. has its range change. If the attack has a target of Creature, its range increases by 500% based on its effective range (the Attack’s range considering the user’s Reach), and Emanation Attacks become Blast, with a range of 10m and their @Trait[blast-x] equal to their base Emanation range (f.e., a 2m Emanation becomes @Trait[blast-2]).

actions.name: Ballistic (Passive)
actions.description: Effect: The user’s @Trait[missile] Attacks have 30% increased Power.

system.description:
Trigger: The user declares a @Trait[contact] Attack.

Effect: Until the triggering Attack is resolved, it loses @Trait[contact] and gains @Trait[missile]. has its range change. If the attack has a target of Creature, its range increases by 500% based on its effective range (the Attack’s range considering the user’s Reach), and Emanation Attacks become Blast, with a range of 10m and their @Trait[blast-x] equal to their base Emanation range (f.e., a 2m Emanation becomes @Trait[blast-2]).

Passive: The user’s @Trait[missile] Attacks have 30% increased Power.
